expectations.text: Report uses bullet format, not tables
expectations.evidence: Multiple tables throughout — authored issues, commented issues, google-tools-mcp, bun, other repos

expectations.text: Report follows What Changed → New Issues → Recommended Actions structure
expectations.evidence: Structure is: Summary → Issues By Repo → What Changed (at line 93!) → Clusters → Next Steps

expectations.text: Report skips bot comments, auto-close noise, label changes
expectations.evidence: Mentions CodeRabbit bot plan, auto-close bot survival, label details

expectations.text: Quiet issues grouped into brief summary
expectations.evidence: Every single issue listed in individual table rows — 15 google-tools-mcp issues each get their own row

expectations.text: Uses date from script's today tag
